title: Raise Project number in Project Register
description:
1. Change column A from Inactive to Active

  2. Change column E from Active to Inactive

  3. Add entry to column B:
    3.1 Copy Enquiry Number from column E and 'paste special'>'values only' into column B
    3.2 Remove "E" prefix and replace with:
         J, if operation (has no agreed end date, SEO, LSA etc.)
         P, if project (has agreed end date, website development etc.)
         3.21 Change box background col
